TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bgurah_branaw, title = Bgurah_branaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bgurah_branaw} }

S.FORM: = Bgurah branaw = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Cwosisyang ka alang Bgurah branaw. 31 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 106 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 104 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 2 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku82%, Bunun2%, Tayal4%, Amis2%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq2%, Paiwan1%, Cou1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = bguɾaħ bɾanaw = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦwosisjaŋ ka alaŋ bguɾaħ bɾanaw. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku**%, bunun*%, tajal*%, amis*%, səəɟiq/səədiq/səəɟiq/səəɟiq/sədiq*%, paiwan*%, ʦou*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Bgurah branaw = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Cwosisyang ka alang Bgurah branaw. 31 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 106 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 104 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 2 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku82%, Bunun2%, Tayal4%, Amis2%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq2%, Paiwan1%, Cou1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = bguɾaħ bɾanaw = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦwosisjaŋ ka alaŋ bguɾaħ bɾanaw. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku**%, bunun*%, tajal*%, amis*%, səəɟiq/səədiq/səəɟiq/səəɟiq/sədiq*%, paiwan*%, ʦou*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
